{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-40346", "cvss": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:N/SC:H/SI:H/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-918", "name": "Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)"}], "description": "## Summary

NocoBase's workflow HTTP request plugin and custom request action plugin make server-side HTTP requests to user-provided URLs without any SSRF protection. An authenticated user can access internal network services, cloud metadata endpoints, and localhost.

## Vulnerable Code

### 1. Workflow HTTP Request Plugin

**`packages/plugins/@nocobase/plugin-workflow-request/src/server/RequestInstruction.ts` lines 117-128:**
```typescript
return axios.request({
  url: trim(url),  // User-controlled, no validation
  method,
  headers,
  params,
  timeout,
  ...(method.toLowerCase() !== 'get' && data != null
    ? { data: transformer ? await transformer(data) : data }
    : {}),
});
```

The `url` at line 98 comes directly from user workflow configuration with only whitespace trimming.

### 2. Custom Request Action Plugin

**`packages/plugins/@nocobase/plugin-action-custom-request/src/server/actions/send.ts` lines 172-198:**
```typescript
const axiosRequestConfig = {
  baseURL: ctx.origin,
  ...options,
  url: getParsedValue(url, variables),  // User-controlled via template
  headers: { ... },
  params: getParsedValue(arrayToObject(params), variables),
  data: getParsedValue(toJSON(data), variables),
};
const res = await axios(axiosRequestConfig);  // No IP validation
```

## Missing Protections

- No `request-filtering-agent` or SSRF library (confirmed via grep across entire codebase)
- No private IP range filtering
- No cloud metadata endpoint blocking
- No URL scheme validation
- No DNS rebinding protection

## Attack Scenario

1. Authenticated user creates a workflow with HTTP Request node
2. Sets URL to `http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/iam/security-credentials/`
3. Triggers the workflow
4. Server fetches AWS metadata and returns IAM credentials in workflow execution logs

Alternatively via Custom Request action:
1. Create custom request with URL `http://127.0.0.1:5432` or `http://10.0.0.1:8080/admin`
2. Execute the action
3. Server makes request to internal service

## Impact

- **Cloud metadata theft**: AWS/GCP/Azure credentials via metadata endpoints
- **Internal network access**: Scan and interact with services on private IP ranges
- **Database access**: Connect to localhost databases (PostgreSQL, Redis, etc.)
- **Authentication required**: Yes (authenticated user), but any workspace member can create workflows", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00384, "percentile": 0.30511}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-mvvv-v22x-xqwp", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-15T19:43:50Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mvvv-v22x-xqwp", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-mvvv-v22x-xqwp"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-40346"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-18T00:16:38Z", "published_at": "2026-04-15T19:43:50Z", "references": ["https://github.com/nocobase/nocobase/security/advisories/GHSA-mvvv-v22x-xqwp", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-40346", "https://github.com/nocobase/nocobase/pull/9079", "https://github.com/nocobase/nocobase/commit/2853368243ed07339c62c548b7d475f4eeaada59", "https://github.com/nocobase/nocobase/releases/tag/v2.0.37", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mvvv-v22x-xqwp"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nocobase/nocobase/security-advisories/GHSA-mvvv-v22x-xqwp", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nocobase/nocobase", "summary": "NocoBase has SSRF in Workflow HTTP Request and Custom Request Plugins", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-14T20:39:09Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-mvvv-v22x-xqwp", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.0.37", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@nocobase/plugin-workflow-request"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.0.37"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: NocoBase has SSRF in Workflow HTTP Request and Custom Request Plugins
